description: [DSRs: crates/rlm-derive/src/generators/schema.rs] Generate __rlm_schema__() method returning PyDict with field metadata (name→(type, desc)) for REPL discovery via dir()/help().

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Code pointers (as of 2026-01-27):
- Typed metadata builder: `crates/dspy-rs/src/predictors/predict.rs` `field_specs_to_value` builds a per-field dict; currently sets `schema` to empty string and adds `__dsrs_field_type`.
- Legacy macros in `crates/dspy-rs/src/lib.rs` `field!` generate schema using `schemars` and fill `schema` + `__dsrs_field_type`.
- Prompt side consumes schema in `crates/dspy-rs/src/adapter/chat.rs` (schema hints for output fields).
Potential implementation: `__rlm_schema__` could expose `FieldSpec` info + rendered schema (via `OutputFormatContent::render` or `TypeIR::diagnostic_repr`) and attach to the generated pyclass in the future `rlm-derive` crate.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 1.6b in dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md): generate `__rlm_schema__` for REPL discovery.
Files: `crates/rlm-derive/src/generators/schema.rs` + wire into `generators/pyclass.rs`.
`__rlm_schema__` returns `PyDict` keyed by field name with `(type, desc)` (extend with constraints if available). Optional: field docstrings if PyO3 supports them.

title: Task 1.6b: Expose __rlm_schema__ metadata for REPL discovery
